title: Laravel: route.matched
description: A route was matched for an incoming request. Emitted before the controller runs.

methods.description: Comma-separated HTTP methods the route accepts.

handler.description: Controller@method string or closure class name.

requestId.description: Request ID from the X-Request-Id or Request-Id header, or a generated UUID. Set by AssignRequestId middleware into Laravel's shared log context.

request_id.description: Alias — same value as requestId, present if set via event context.
